topics.title: Satellite Radio Origins and Innovation
topics.summary: The studio discusses the history of satellite radio and a meeting with its creator, who transitioned from male to female after inventing the technology.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Origins and Celebrity Interactions
topics.summary: The studio discusses the history of Sirius satellite radio, the identity of its inventor, and various anecdotes regarding celebrity security and public appearances.

topics.title: Cabbie Benefit Show and Comedy Club Memories
topics.summary: The studio discusses a comedy club's history, an upcoming benefit show for Cabbie, and various personal anecdotes regarding media publicity and holiday cards.

topics.title: Upcoming Guest Appearances and Late Night Talk Show
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming guests including Martha Stewart and a planned appearance by an actor named Eric, while also discussing the transition of late-night talk show hosts.

topics.title: Stepfather's Relationship with Stepdaughter
topics.summary: The studio hosts and callers discuss the controversial situation of a man who is in a romantic relationship with his 18-year-old stepdaughter following a divorce.

topics.title: The Biggest Loser Finale Critique
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production of The Biggest Loser, specifically criticizing host Caroline Ray for interrupting emotional moments during a winner's celebration.

topics.title: Martha Stewart Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with Martha Stewart regarding her personal life, her legal history and subsequent house arrest, and her experiences as a public figure.

topics.title: Martha Stewart's Prison Experience and Personal Life
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding Martha Stewart's time in prison, her personal relationships, her divorce from an unfaithful husband, and her interactions with various public figures.

topics.title: Martha Stewart and Howard Stern Interview
topics.summary: The show features Martha Stewart discussing her business success, personal life, and a brief segment regarding Pam Anderson's divorce.

topics.title: Pam Anderson Interview and Holiday Gift Opening
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Pam Anderson regarding her past relationship with Kid Rock, followed by a segment where Howard Stern opens Christmas gifts.

topics.title: Holiday Gift Exchange
topics.summary: The studio hosts a holiday gift exchange where participants unwrap items ranging from vintage magazines and chess pieces to a large gift certificate for Barney's.

topics.title: The Gossip Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts engage in a game where they must identify the fake story among four celebrity-related news items, ultimately concluding that the report regarding Michael Richards being chased by a mob is true.

topics.title: Tributes to Actor Peter Boyle
topics.summary: The studio pays tribute to the late actor Peter Boyle, discussing his career highlights, a personal anecdote involving him and marijuana, and his regret over passing on a major film role.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio covers topics ranging from celebrity news and upcoming holiday specials to reports on missing hikers, the death of a motorcycle champion, and international conflicts.

topics.title: Iraq Strategy and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses geopolitical strategies in Iraq, global warming reports, legal issues regarding a plane crash, and various celebrity updates including news on Angelina Jolie, Kate Blanchett, and upcoming film releases.
